mapper.insert: INSERT INTO doctor_evaluation(doctor_id, patient_card_id, registration_id, video_diagnose_id, score, comment, create_time) VALUES(#{doctorId}, #{patientCardId}, #{registrationId}, #{videoDiagnoseId}, #{score}, #{comment}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM doctor_evaluation e JOIN patient_user_info_card c ON e.patient_card_id = c.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT e.id, e.score, e.comment, d.name AS doctorName, d.job AS job, DATE_FORMAT(e.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS createTime FROM doctor_evaluation e JOIN patient_user_info_card c ON e.patient_card_id = c.id JOIN doctor d ON d.id = e.doctor_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY e.create_time DESC LIMIT #{length} OFFSET #{start}

SELECT e.id, e.score, e.comment, c.name AS patientName, DATE_FORMAT(e.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS createTime FROM doctor_evaluation e JOIN patient_user_info_card c ON e.patient_card_id = c.id WHERE e.doctor_id = #{doctorId} ORDER BY e.create_time DESC LIMIT #{length} OFFSET #{start}
SELECT ROUND(AVG(score), 1) AS avgScore, COUNT(*) AS totalCount FROM doctor_evaluation WHERE doctor_id = #{doctorId}
